targets.query:
from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="power" and r.unit=="cal_E47730" and r._field=="v")
|> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty:false)
|> keep(columns:["_time","_value","phase"])

from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
|> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
|> filter(fn:(r)=> r._measurement=="cal_meter" and r.unit=="cal_E47730" and r._field=="v")
|> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty:false)
|> set(key: "_field", value: "SDM")
|> keep(columns:["_time","_value","_field"])

from(bucket:"zaxenergy")
